commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 3. "Send Thee help from the Holy, and from Sion defend Thee" (ver. 2). Making for Thee a sanctified Body, the Church, from watching safe, which waiteth when Thou shalt come from the wedding.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Sion, where God was supposed to reside, in the tabernacle; though he was also in heaven, ver. 7. (Calmet)
